# JG Wentworth — Debt Relief

> A lead-generation landing page for The JG Wentworth Company's debt relief
> program. Visitors complete a short multi-step form to check whether they
> pre-qualify for help reducing and consolidating their debt. JG Wentworth has
> over 30 years of experience and has served 375K+ customers.

The site is a single funnel, not a content site. Its purpose is to collect a
qualified lead and route the visitor to a confirmation page where a debt
specialist follows up. Form submission is the primary conversion.

## Pages
- [Debt Relief application](/index.php): The main page. An 8-step form — debt amount, employment status, annual income, name, street address, date of birth (with FCRA/credit consent), email, and phone (with TCPA contact consent). Includes trust badges and customer reviews.
- [You're Pre-Qualified](/thank-you.php): Post-submission confirmation page (noindex). Shows assigned-specialist messaging and a click-to-call CTA. Reached only after the form is submitted.

## What the program is
- Debt resolution program provided by JGW Debt Settlement, LLC. Program length typically 24–60 months.
- Not available in every state, and not all debts are eligible. Results vary by individual situation.
- JG Wentworth does not provide legal, financial, tax, or credit-repair advice.
